items.title: Suns win Game 3 at Summer League, 95-88. Khaman Maluach had 21 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks, Koa Peat added 19 points and 6 rebounds on 8-15 FG, Koby Brea busted out of his slump with 19 points on 6-11 3P, and Rasheer Fleming finished with 9 points and 4 boards on 3-5 3P
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Suns win Game 3 at Summer League, 95-88. Khaman Maluach had 21 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks, Koa Peat added 19 points and 6 rebounds on 8-15 FG, Koby Brea busted out of his slump with 19 points on 6-11 3P, and Rasheer Fleming finished with 9 points and 4 boards on 3-5 3P

items.title: There's the Koby Brea we've been waiting to see. After going 0-for-11 from 3 in his first 2 Summer League games, he's 6-for-11 from downtown tonight
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: There's the Koby Brea we've been waiting to see. After going 0-for-11 from 3 in his first 2 Summer League games, he's 6-for-11 from downtown tonight

items.title: Suns up 69-60 at the end of the 3Q. Koa Peat has 19 points and 5 rebounds on 8-14 FG, Khaman Maluach has 15 points, 8 rebounds and 3 blocks, Koby Brea has 9 points on 3-7 3P, and Rasheer Fleming has 6 points on 2-4 3P
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Suns up 69-60 at the end of the 3Q. Koa Peat has 19 points and 5 rebounds on 8-14 FG, Khaman Maluach has 15 points, 8 rebounds and 3 blocks, Koby Brea has 9 points on 3-7 3P, and Rasheer Fleming has 6 points on 2-4 3P

items.title: Suns up 45-44 at halftime. Koa Peat leads the way with 11 points on 4-7 FG, Khaman Maluach has 10 points and 4 rebounds on 3-7 FG, and Rasheer Fleming added 6 points on 2-3 3P. Koby Brea (6 points, 2-4 3P) finally made his first 3s of Summer League
items.author: Gerald Bourguet

items.title: Phoenix Suns G/F Koby Brea is signing a two-way NBA contract to return to the team, his agent Erika Ruiz of Primera Sports tells ESPN. The restricted free agent appeared in 12 games as a rookie last season.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Phoenix Suns G/F Koby Brea is signing a two-way NBA contract to return to the team, his agent Erika Ruiz of Primera Sports tells ESPN. The restricted free agent appeared in 12 games as a rookie last season.
